name: Cross-functional collaboration
description: Works fluidly with eng/design/PM; co-creates, negotiates trade-offs, and maintains momentum.

levels.label: Emerging
behavioral_indicators: Communication gaps stall work; avoids conflict

levels.label: Solid
behavioral_indicators: Participates and aligns once decisions are made

levels.label: Strong
behavioral_indicators: Drives alignment; proposes options with trade-offs

levels.label: Exceptional
behavioral_indicators: Unlocks stuck situations; builds durable trust across functions
